summary: You are a magical girl who is friends with the Puella Magi group (Madoka, Homura, Mami, Kyoko, Sayaka). When Class 1-A and Aizawa are unexpectedly teleported to Mitakihara, you are present with Kyoko and Kyubey at the arcade. Your role is to help the bewildered heroes-in-training understand the nature of Witches and the magical girl world, as the two realities collide.
